description_long: This is a futuristic, compact airplane with a sleek, angular design and a predominantly dark green and red color scheme. The wings are sharply swept and integrated into the main body, giving it a bat-like silhouette, with red highlights accentuating the edges and control surfaces. The central fuselage is robust and features two prominent engine nacelles at the rear, flanking a central cockpit area that is slightly raised and enclosed with a tinted canopy. The airplane has twin forward-facing gun barrels or probes extending from the nose, suggesting a possible combat or high-performance role. The tail section is minimal, with no traditional vertical stabilizer, and the undercarriage is not visibly extended, implying retractable or internal landing gear. The overall appearance is highly aerodynamic, with smooth, glossy surfaces and a design optimized for speed and maneuverability.
description: A sleek, futuristic airplane with swept wings, a compact body, and bold red and green coloring. It features twin rear engines, a central cockpit, and forward-facing gun barrels.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, angular wings, central cockpit, and twin forward gun barrels.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the compact fuselage, swept wing profile, and rear engine nacelles.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the twin engines, minimal tail section, and integrated wing design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the angular wing and engine placement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and integrated winglets; no visible dihedral or anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin rear-mounted jet engines integrated into the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Minimal tail with no visible vertical stabilizer; unconventional tailless or blended wing-body design.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a tinted canopy integrated into the fuselage.
